<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="default" data-mode="light" data-custom>
<head>
    <!-- Meta -->
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover">
    <meta name="description" content="">
    <meta name="author" content="mObywatel">
    <!-- Default Meta -->
            <meta name="theme-color" content="#f5f6fb">
        <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="mObywatel">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="default">
    <!-- [LOCAL] noscript redirect disabled -->
    <!-- Open Graph Meta -->
    <meta property='og:title' content='mObywatel'>

    <!-- Twitter Meta -->

    <meta name='twitter:description' content=''>
    <meta name='twitter:image' content='/assets/img/logo.png'>
    <!-- Links -->
    <link rel="shortcut icon" href="/assets/img/logo.png" type="image/x-icon">
    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="/assets/img/apple-180x.png">
    <link rel="apple-touch-startup-image" sizes="180x180" href="/assets/img/apple-180x.png">
    <link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/css/style.css">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:ital,opsz,wght@0,14..32,100..900;1,14..32,100..900&family=Roboto:ital,wght@0,100..900;1,100..900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

    <script src='/assets/js/global/qrcode.js'></script>
    <!-- Service Worker -->
    <script src="/assets/js/global/worker-starter.js"></script>
    <!-- Libraries & Assets -->
    <script src="/assets/js/global/utilities.js"></script>
    <!-- Pages -->
    <script src="/assets/js/pages/index.js"></script>
                        <!-- Documents -->
    <script src='/assets/js/pages/documents/mdowod.js'></script>                <!-- Main JavaScript -->
    <script src="/assets/js/script.js"></script>
    <script>
        // Override data polling (data is already set server-side by BeautifulSoup)
        if (typeof mdowodManager !== 'undefined') {
            mdowodManager.startDataPolling = function() {};
            $(function() { mdowodManager.init(); });
        }
    </script>
    <script src="/assets/js/global/enhancements.js" defer></script>
    <!-- Title -->
    <title>mObywatel</title>
    <style>
        body { opacity: 1 !important; transform: none !important; }
        /* Disable skeleton shimmer — data is already injected server-side */
        .skeleton { color: inherit !important; background: none !important; }
        .skeleton::after { display: none !important; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="background[unset]">
    <div class="notification-group primary absolute bottom[50px] fillWidth height[80px] px[s] z[4] display-none">
        <div class="notification flex justify[between] align[center] fillWidth min-height[40px] radius[xs] px[s] shadow hide">
            <p class="font-weight[400] font[Inter] text-align[left] text-size[14]" data-p="notification-text" data-default="Twoje dane są aktualne"></p>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fillWidth fillHeight overflow[y-auto]" data-standalone>
        <div class="dashboard-navigation sticky top[0] background[unset] flex direction[row] justify[around] align[end] g[s] fillWidth height[45px] px[s] z[2] pb[xs]">
            <a class="redirect flex direction[row] g[4] align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth text[nowrap] height[20px]" data-redirect="documents">
                <i class="far fa-chevron-left text-size[24]"></i>
                Dokumenty            </a>
            <div class="fillWidth flex justify[center] align[center] height[20px]">
                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[18]">mDowód</h1>
            </div>
            <div class="flex justify[end] align[center] height[20px] fillWidth">
                <img src="/assets/svg/more/support.svg" class="theme-icon square[15px]" alt="">
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] card danger fillWidth autoHeight p[xs] mb[s] display-none">
            <p class="primary font-weight[700] font[Inter] text-align[center] text-size[16]">Wersja demonstracyjna</p>
            <button class="radius[full] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[12] py[16] font-weight[600] text-size[16] flex justify[center] align[center]" data-button="hide_popup">
                <p class="danger font-weight[700] font[Inter] text-align[center] text-size[14]">Ukryj</p>
            </button>
        </div>
        <div class="relative fillWidth autoHeight us[none] px[s] pb[s] mb[80]  documentFade" data-wrapper>
            <div class="flex direction[column] g[s] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth fillHeight">
                <div class="flex fillWidth autoHeight">
                    <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] fillWidth text-size[12]" data-p="time" data-time="Czas:"></p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex direction[column] autoHeight fillWidth">
                    <div class="card mdowod flex direction[row] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[340px] radius[m] p[20] radius[none-bottom-left] radius[none-bottom-right]">
                        <div class="z[1] fillWidth max-width[40] fillHeight flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] g[8]">
                            <div class="relative width[130px] min-width[130px] height[170px] min-height[170px] overflow[hidden]">
                                <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="max-width[130px] fillWidth fillHeight radius[m]" style="filter: grayscale(100%); object-fit: cover; object-position: center; -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent), linear-gradient(to left, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent); -webkit-mask-composite: intersect; mask-image: linear-gradient(to top, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent), linear-gradient(to left, transparent, black 6.5%, black 96.5%, transparent); mask-composite: intersect;" alt="Uzupełnij obrazek" data-placeholder="mdowod_picture" id="user_photo">
                            </div>
                            <div class="autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <img src="/assets/img/flaga.gif" class="width[70px]">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex direction[row] g[4] autoHeight max-height[50px] fillWidth align[center] justify[start]">
                                <div class="emblem" data-emblem>
                                    <img src="/assets/img/godlo.gif" class="max-width[30px] display-flex" alt="">
                                    <div class="emblem[card] display-none" id="emblem">
                                        <div class="emblem[eagle]" style="--img-url: url('/assets/img/godlo_mask.png');"></div>
                                        <div class="emblem[image]" style="--img-url: url('/assets/img/godlo.png');"></div>
                                        <div class="emblem[mask]">
                                            <div class="emblem[rainbow]"></div>
                                            <div class="emblem[spectral]"></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex align[center] justify[start] fillWidth fillHeight">
                                    <p class="label text-size[10] max-width[60]" style="color: #808080;text-wrap: balance;">Rzeczpospolita Polska</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="z[1] pl[20] fillWidth fillHeight flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] g[xs]">
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_first_name">Marcin</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Imię (Imiona)</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_last_name">Polak</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Nazwisko</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="citizenship">Polskie</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Obywatelstwo</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_birthday">06.03.2008</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Data urodzenia</p>
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex autoHeight direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[start]">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_pesel">08230633597</h1>
                                <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[12]" style="color: #4a4a4a">Numer PESEL</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card shadow p[8] fillWidth height[60px] radius[none-top-left] radius[none-top-right] radius[m] flex direction[row] g[s]">
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px]">
                                <img src="/assets/svg/id_card/checkmark.svg" class="square[30px]">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth px[4]">
                                <h1 class="font-weight[600] text-size[12] text-align[left] fillWidth" style="color: #16be2d;">Dokument ważny</h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex direction[row] justify[center] g[8] align[center] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[90px] px[m]">
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight fillWidth height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]" data-redirect="qr_code?tabOpen=scan_qr">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/id_card/check_document.svg" class="document-icon square[20px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[450] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Potwierdź swoje dane</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight fillWidth height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]" data-button="identity_card">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/img/id_details.png" class="max-width[25px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[450] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Dane dowodu osobistego</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight fillWidth height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]" data-button="restrict_pesel">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/id_card/shield_lock.svg" class="document-icon square[20px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[450] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Zastrzeż PESEL</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[4] fillHeight fillWidth height[90px] min-height[90px] min-width[80px]" data-button="other_shortcuts">
                        <div class="card flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px] radius[full]">
                            <img src="/assets/svg/id_card/shortcuts.svg" class="document-icon square[20px]">
                        </div>
                        <p class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[450] text-size[12] text[balance] max-width[80px]">Pozostałe skróty</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight radius[xl] shadow overflow[hidden]">
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Seria i numer mDowodu</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[700] text-size[24] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_series"></h1>
                            <button class="secondary radius[m] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[16] py[16] font-weight[500] text-size[14] flex justify[center] align[center]" data-button="copy_mdowod_series" data-notification="Skopiowano serię i numer mDowodu">Kopiuj</button>
                        </div>
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14] max-width[80]">Dane mDowodu i dowodu osobistego są inne - to dwa różne dokumenty.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Termin ważności mDowodu</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_expiration"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Data wydania mDowodu</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_issue"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Imię ojca</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_fathers_name"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Imię matki</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_mothers_name"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[start] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight max-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow overflow[hidden]" data-button="additional_details">
                    <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth min-height[80px]">
                        <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font-weight[600] text-size[18] text-align[left] fillWidth">Twoje dodatkowe dane</h1>
                            <i class="label far fa-chevron-down"></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Nazwisko rodowe</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_family_name"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Płeć</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_gender">Mężczyzna</h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Nazwisko rodowe ojca</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_fathers_family"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Nazwisko rodowe matki</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_mothers_family"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Miejsce urodzenia</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_place_of_birth"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Kraj urodzenia</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]">Polska</h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Adres zameldowania na pobyt stały</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_residence">UL. </h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                    <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth p[s]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Data zameldowania na pobyt stały</p>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="mdowod_residence_date"></h1>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow">
                    <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] fillWidth">
                        <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth px[s]">
                            <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[center] autoWidth">
                                <h1 class="label font-weight[400] text-size[14] text-align[left] fillWidth">Ostatnia aktualizacja</h1>
                                <p class="font-weight[600] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth" data-placeholder="mdowod_last_update"></p>
                            </div>
                            <button class="secondary radius[m] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[16] py[16] font-weight[500] text-size[14] flex justify[center] align[center]" data-button="last_update_popup">Aktualizuj</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="other_shortcuts absolute top[0] z[3] fillWidth fillHeight background[unset]" style="transform: translateX(100%);">
            <div class="dashboard-navigation sticky top[0] background[backdrop] flex direction[row] justify[around] align[end] g[s] fillWidth height[45px] px[s] z[max] pb[xs]">
                <a class="redirect flex direction[row] g[4] align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth text[nowrap] height[20px]" data-button="other_shortcuts_back">
                    <i class="far fa-chevron-left text-size[24]"></i>
                    Wróć                </a>
                <div class="fillWidth flex justify[center] align[center] height[20px]">
                    <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[18] text[nowrap]">Pozostałe skróty</h1>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify[end] align[center] height[20px] fillWidth">
                    <div class="square[25px]"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="relative fillWidth fillHeight us[none] px[s] py[s]">
                <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[xs] fillWidth autoHeight pb[m]">
                    <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow">
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px]">
                                <img src="/assets/svg/id_card/tickets.svg" style="max-width: 35px !important;">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth px[s]">
                                <h1 class="font-weight[600] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth">Mandaty</h1>
                                <i class="label far fa-chevron-right"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px]">
                                <img src="/assets/svg/id_card/elections.svg" class="max-width[40px]">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth px[s]">
                                <h1 class="font-weight[600] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth">Wybory</h1>
                                <i class="label far fa-chevron-right"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card danger flex direction[column] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow">
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex justify[center] align[center] square[50px]">
                                <img src="/assets/svg/id_card/trash.svg" class="max-width[40px]">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth px[s]">
                                <h1 class="font-weight[600] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth">Usuń dokument</h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="identity_card absolute top[0] z[3] fillWidth fillHeight background[unset]" style="transform: translateX(100%);">
            <div class="dashboard-navigation sticky top[0] background[backdrop] flex direction[row] justify[around] align[end] g[s] fillWidth height[45px] px[s] z[max] pb[xs]">
                <a class="redirect flex direction[row] g[4] align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth text[nowrap] height[20px]"  data-button="identity_card_back">
                    <i class="far fa-chevron-left text-size[24]"></i>
                    Wróć                </a>
                <div class="fillWidth flex justify[center] align[center] height[20px]">
                    <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[18] text[nowrap]">Dane dowodu osobistego</h1>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify[end] align[center] height[20px] fillWidth">
                    <div class="square[25px]"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="relative fillWidth fillHeight us[none] px[s] pt[0]" data-group="identity_card">
                <div class="flex direction[column] justify[start] align[center] g[s] fillWidth autoHeight">
                    <div class="card fillWidth autoHeight p[s] flex direction[column] g[12] radius[xl] shadow">
                        <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[12]">Seria i numer</p>
                            <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[700] text-size[20]" data-placeholder="personal_id_series"></h1>
                                <button class="secondary radius[m] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[16] py[16] font-weight[500] text-size[14] flex justify[center] align[center]"  data-button="copy_id_card_series" data-notification="Skopiowano serię i numer dowodu osobistego">Kopiuj</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                        <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[12]">Status</p>
                            <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] g[4] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-size[14]" style="color: #16be2d;"></i>
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16]" data-placeholder="dowod_issuer">Wydany</h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                        <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[12]">Organ wydający</p>
                            <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="personal_id_issuer"></h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                        <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[12]">Termin ważności</p>
                            <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="personal_id_expiration"></h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                        <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth">
                            <p class="label font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[400] text-size[14]">Data wydania</p>
                            <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[16] text[uppercase]" data-placeholder="personal_id_issue"></h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow">
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth">
                                <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[center] autoWidth">
                                    <p class="label font-weight[400] text-size[14] text-align[left] fillWidth">Ostatnia aktualizacja</p>
                                    <p class="font-weight[600] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth" data-placeholder="last_update"></p>
                                </div>
                                <button class="secondary radius[m] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[16] py[16] font-weight[500] text-size[14] flex justify[center] align[center]" data-button="last_update_popup">Aktualizuj</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow">
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex justify[center] align[center] square[30px]">
                                <img src="/assets/svg/id_card/pin_code.svg?_=1255" class="max-width[25px]">
                            </div>
                            <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth">
                                <h1 class="font-weight[600] text-size[16] text-align[left] max-width[75] px[8]">Zmień PIN do podpisu osobistego</h1>
                                <i class="label far fa-chevron-right"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="restrict_pesel absolute top[0] z[3] fillWidth fillHeight background[unset]" style="transform: translateX(100%);">
            <div class="dashboard-navigation sticky top[0] background[backdrop] flex direction[row] justify[around] align[end] g[s] fillWidth height[45px] px[s] z[max] pb[xs]">
                <a class="redirect flex direction[row] g[4] align[center] font-weight[400] text-size[16] text-align[left] fillWidth text[nowrap] height[20px]"  data-button="restrict_pesel_back">
                    <i class="far fa-chevron-left text-size[24]"></i>
                    Wróć                </a>
                <div class="fillWidth flex justify[center] align[center] height[20px]">
                    <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[center] font-weight[600] text-size[18] text[nowrap]">Zastrzeż PESEL</h1>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify[end] align[center] height[20px] fillWidth">
                    <div class="square[25px]"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="relative fillWidth fillHeight us[none] px[s] pt[0]" data-group="identity_card">
                <div class="flex direction[column] g[s] fillWidth autoHeight">
                    <div class="flex justify[center] align[center] radius[full] square[80px]" style="background-color: rgb(var(--pesel-background), 1);">
                        <img src="/assets/img/schemes/ochrona_danych/zastrzez_pesel.png" class="square[65px] z[1]">
                    </div>
                    <div class="autoHeight fillWidth flex justify[start] align[center]">
                        <h1 class="font[Inter] font-weight[700] text-size[32]">Twój PESEL jest niezastrzeżony</h1>
                    </div>
                    <div class="autoHeight fillWidth flex justify[start] align[center]">
                        <p class="label font[Inter] font-weight[400] text-size[16]">Zastrzeż PESEL, żeby nikt nie wykorzystał go bez Twojej wiedzy.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card flex direction[column] justify[center] align[start] fillWidth autoHeight min-height[80px] radius[xl] shadow">
                        <div class="flex direction[row] justify[start] align[center] p[s] fillWidth">
                            <div class="flex text-align[center] justify[between] align[center] height[50px] fillWidth">
                                <div class="flex direction[column] g[4] justify[start] align[center] autoWidth">
                                    <p class="font-weight[600] text-size[20] text-align[left] fillWidth">Zastrzeż PESEL</p>
                                </div>
                                <button class="secondary radius[m] border[unset] max-height[20px] px[16] py[16] font-weight[500] text-size[14] flex justify[center] align[center]">Zastrzeż</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify[start] align[start] fillWidth height[30px]">
                        <div class="height[40px] flex justify[center] align[center] cursor[pointer]">
                            <p class="font[Inter] font-weight[600] text-size[16]">Historia</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card fillWidth autoHeight p[s] flex direction[column] g[12] radius[xl] shadow">
                        <div class="flex direction[column] justify[center] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth min-height[40px]">
                            <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[18]">Kto sprawdzał Twój PESEL</h1>
                                <i class="label far fa-chevron-right"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="separator[x]"></div>
                        <div class="flex direction[column] justify[center] g[4] autoHeight fillWidth min-height[40px]">
                            <div class="flex direction[row] justify[between] g[4] align[center] autoHeight fillWidth">
                                <h1 class="font[Inter] text-align[left] font-weight[600] text-size[18]">Twoje zmiany</h1>
                                <i class="label far fa-chevron-right"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="navigation backdrop[8px] sticky  top[100] flex justify[end] align[center] bottom[0] height[80px] z[max]" data-group="navigation">
    <div class="fillWidth fillHeight flex direction[row] justify[around] align[start]">
                <a
            href="/documents"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="documents"
        >
            <img src="/assets/svg/navigation/light/documents_active.svg" class="square[20px]" alt="documents">
            <span class="label active text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Dokumenty            </span>
        </a>
                <a
            href="/services"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="services"
        >
            <img src="/assets/svg/navigation/light/services.svg" class="square[20px]" alt="services">
            <span class="label  text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Usługi            </span>
        </a>
                <a
            href="/qr_code"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="qr_code"
        >
            <img src="/assets/svg/navigation/light/qr_code.svg" class="square[20px]" alt="qr_code">
            <span class="label  text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Kod QR            </span>
        </a>
                <a
            href="/more"
            class="fillHeight fillWidth flex direction[column] g[4] justify[center] align[center] max-height[60px] mb[4] text-decoration[none]"
            aria-label="more"
        >
            <img src="/assets/svg/navigation/light/more.svg" class="square[20px]" alt="more">
            <span class="label  text-size[10] text[nowrap]">
                Więcej            </span>
        </a>
            </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
